title: Contact | Steve Barclay
meta_description: Steve Barclay - Conservative MP for North East Cambridgeshire - latest news and campaigns
text_excerpt: Contact | Steve Barclay Skip to main content Main navigation Join my Newsletter News Campaigns Our Plan Survey In Parliament Compulsory ID Contact Me Contact Leave this field blank Steve on FaceBook Steve on X Steve on Linkedin Steve on YouTube Do feel free to get in touch if there is anything I can ever help you with. I receive a high volume of emails, letters, and phone calls each day, and I will try to reply to you as quickly as possible. However, please note that all communications, including contact forms, are dealt with in the order in which they are received. Please note that Parliamentary rules prevent an MP from dealing with enquiries from another MP’s constituents. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by Steve Barclay on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
